creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
Created attachment 232712
poudriere build log for cmake-3.22.2

www/py-requests requires dns/py-idna>=2.5, but the source of py-requests require the version to be <3,>=2.5. Now that dns/py-idna is updated to 3.3, this causes packages that depend on www/py-requests to fail.
